title: Customer.io vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Customer.io vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Customer.io and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Customer.io is built for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Customer.io wins for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Customer.io or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Customer.io?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
